title: Verify MCP Contract v1
description: Canonical contract for the Verify MCP verification authority. Defines inputs, outputs, check types, status taxonomy, fail-closed rules, and resume semantics.

semantics.pass: All required checks satisfied. Workflow may proceed.

warn.required_check: Treated as blocked unless explicit policy exception exists. Exception must be logged with rationale artifact.
warn.optional_check: Workflow may continue. Rationale artifact required explaining why continuation is acceptable.

semantics.fail: One or more required checks failed with evidence. Workflow cannot proceed. Requires rework or plan_blocker routing.
semantics.blocked: Required evidence or checks are missing entirely. Workflow cannot proceed until evidence is supplied. Fail-closed default.

statusTaxonomy.invariant: No status outside this set is valid. Any unknown status is treated as blocked.

failClosedRules.rule: Any required acceptance criterion without a corresponding verification result is status: blocked.
Any required criterion with status warn is treated as blocked unless a policy exception with rationale artifact exists.
overall_status cannot be pass if any required criterion is not pass.
fail_closed_enforced must be true on every VerificationArtifact. Artifacts with fail_closed_enforced: false are rejected.
Freshness check failure on a time-sensitive claim sets that criterion to fail, not warn.

unit.evidence: Test runner output with pass/fail per test case.

integration.evidence: Test runner output or HTTP response captures.

e2e.description: Full workflow verification from input to output.
e2e.evidence: End-to-end test output or workflow trace.

api.evidence: API response captures with schema validation.

freshness.description: Time-sensitive claim verification via live lookup.
freshness.evidence: Timestamped lookup result with source reference.
freshness.mandatory_when: ExecutionPlan.verification_requirements.freshness_required is true or ResearchReport contains time-sensitive findings.

verificationLadder.description: Per-workflow-class minimum required check types, in order.
verificationLadder.rule: A workflow cannot reach overall_status: pass unless all checks in its ladder have been executed and passed.

optional.note: Provided when freshness verification is needed.

artifact_requirements: Must reference all criteria_ids from the ExecutionPlan.
Must reference evidence_ids from the evidence registry.
Must include freshness_results when freshness_required is true.
Must include ladder_compliance when workflow_class has a non-empty ladder.

blocked.resume_condition: Missing evidence is supplied and a new verification pass is triggered.
blocked.requires: New verification_request from Orchestrator with updated evidence_ids.

fail.resume_condition: Rework is performed (Builder re-executes failed steps) and new BuildReport is submitted.

warn_required.resume_condition: Policy exception is filed with rationale artifact, OR rework brings criterion to pass.
warn_required.requires: Policy exception artifact or updated evidence.

authorityConformanceChecks.description: Checks Verify MCP performs to enforce role boundaries.

checks.check: Every field in every schema artifact has a fieldOwnership entry.
checks.rule: Deny by default: fields without ownership metadata fail the gate.

checks.check: Every fieldOwnership path resolves to an actual schema field.
checks.rule: Reject unknown paths: orphaned ownership entries fail the gate.

checks.check: No Planner-writtenBy field contains routing/state mutation content.
No Orchestrator-writtenBy field contains plan authoring content.
BuildReport.evidence_map covers every criteria_id from ExecutionPlan.acceptance_criteria.
